HGSS.051.0000:
Blaine: Hey, you!\f
My Gym on Cinnabar Island was burned
down by the eruption!\f
But I will not give up!
Take a look at this cave.\f
We have turned it into a Gym, and I am
still acting as a Gym Leader!\f
I will give you the Gym Badge
if you manage to defeat me!\f
Are you ready? Here we go!\f
HGSS.051.0001:
Blaine: Awesome. I have burned out...\r
Take this Volcano Badge!\f
HGSS.051.0002:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Volcano Badge from Blaine!
HGSS.051.0003:
Blaine: Here, I will give you this, too.
It’s called Overheat!\f
It has a slight drawback, but it’s
powerful and well worth it!\f
HGSS.051.0004:
Blaine: I did lose this time, but I’m
going to win next time.\f
When I rebuild my Cinnabar Gym,
we have to hold a rematch.
HGSS.051.0005:
Blaine: My Fire-type Pokémon will be
even stronger! Just you watch!
HGSS.051.0006:
Wow, to see a Gym in a cave like this?
I’d love to explore it.\f
HGSS.051.0009:
I am in the middle of collecting
battle records.\f
Can you help me?\f
HGSS.051.0010:
I didn’t expect you to be so good!
Who in the world are you?
HGSS.051.0011:
I didn’t expect you to be so good!
Who in the world are you?\f
HGSS.051.0013:
Pardon me!
I failed to sense how strong you are.
HGSS.051.0014:
Pardon me!
I failed to sense how strong you are.\f
HGSS.051.0015:
A white lab coat is a researcher’s life.
We may be living in a cave like this, but\r
we never forget to do the laundry.\f
HGSS.051.0016:
This white lab coat makes me feel like I
have become smarter for some reason.
HGSS.051.0017:
This white lab coat makes me feel like I
have become smarter for some reason.\f
HGSS.051.0018:
Blaine may have lost his Gym, but he
never gives up. His perseverance\r
is what motivates me!\f
HGSS.051.0019:
Together with Blaine, we will rebuild
our Gym!
HGSS.051.0020:
Together with Blaine, we will rebuild
our Gym!\f
HGSS.051.0021:
We lost the Gym on Cinnabar Island and
felt lost before we came here.\f
HGSS.051.0022:
We take a step back when we are
defeated...\f
Don’t you think we are downright
honest?\f
Never put us in the same category as
Scientists who help bad guys.
HGSS.051.0023:
We take a step back when we are
defeated...\f
Don’t you think we are downright
honest?\f
Never put us in the same category as
Scientists who help bad guys.\f
HGSS.051.0024:
Yo! Legend in the making!\f
This Gym has many Trainers and rocks
in the way from the rebuilding.\r
It sure won’t be easy to get to Blaine!\f
But keep your cool and defeat the
Trainers one by one, and you will surely\r
find the path!
HGSS.051.0025:
The Gym Leader rebuilding his Gym and
the Trainer from Johto who has come to\r
challenge that Gym Leader...\f
I have witnessed a hot battle!
